children.name: func attack（）{ if dead || attacking｛ return }

onCloned => { shinobis = append(shinobis, this) println "shinobis num", len(shinobis) dead = false show for { if dead { break } distance := rand(from:10, to:120) wait secs:rand(from:0.5, to:1.5) step step:distance wait secs:0.5 attack changeHeading dir:180 step step:distance wait secs:0.5 attack changeHeading dir:180 } }
